title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.624 - Terminating negotiations, rejecting requests and responses
text:
227.624.  Terminating negotiations, rejecting requests and responses. — If the commission is not satisfied with the results of negotiations with a potential private partner for an agreement, the commission may terminate negotiations with the potential private partner.  The commission may reject any and all requests for approval and responses to a request for proposals.
(L. 2006 H.B. 1380)
